release_name: CyberShield Buyer-First AI Decision Assurance and Google Sheets Capture Prep
status: static prototype, buyer-first positioning plus Google Sheets capture deployment prep
root_behavior: Root landing page leads with broader AI Decision Assurance value and directs visitors to the guided vendor-risk sample.
north_star: Before relying on AI, CyberShield shows whether the recommendation is defensible.
core_workflow: AI-generated recommendation in -> AI Trust Decision Record out
first_proof_point: AI-generated vendor-risk recommendation in -> defensible AI Trust Decision Record out
release_guardrails: Broader value message is AI Decision Assurance, but the first workflow remains vendor-risk recommendation review.
Vendor-risk guided route remains the primary buyer-facing demo.
ATDR workbench remains internal inspection only and must not be surfaced as the public demo.
Google Sheets capture is not live until a deployed Apps Script endpoint is configured and tested.
Legacy Trust Kernel remains preserved and is not restored as root.
Do not claim CRM/Google Sheet capture succeeded unless endpoint is configured and POST succeeds.
Do not treat SOC 2 as automatic approval.
Do not treat framework mapping as compliance proof.
Do not return Medium confidence for unsupported out-of-scope inputs.
static_prototype_limitations: Browser Print / Save PDF is current PDF path
CRM capture is local/pending until REPORT_CAPTURE_ENDPOINT is configured
